nakshatras.name: Ashwini
nakshatras.meaning: The Horse Woman / Star of Transport
nakshatras.description: Ashwini represents swiftness, healing, and initiation. A powerful nakshatra for new beginnings, especially in health and travel.

nakshatras.name: Bharani
nakshatras.meaning: The Bearer / Star of Restraint
nakshatras.description: Bharani represents the power of transformation, facing limitations, and the cycle of life and death. It governs deep emotional endurance.

nakshatras.name: Krittika
nakshatras.meaning: The Cutter / Star of Fire
nakshatras.description: Krittika is a fiery nakshatra ruled by Agni. It grants the power to cut through illusions and burn away impurities for spiritual growth.

nakshatras.name: Rohini
nakshatras.meaning: The Red One / Ascending Star
nakshatras.description: Rohini is the star of creativity, beauty, and nourishment. It bestows material abundance, artistic talent, and deep sensuality.

nakshatras.name: Mrigashira
nakshatras.meaning: The Deer's Head / Searching Star
nakshatras.description: Mrigashira represents curiosity, exploration, and the restless search for meaning. It brings a gentle, inquisitive energy.

nakshatras.name: Ardra
nakshatras.meaning: The Moist One / Star of Tears
nakshatras.description: Ardra is a stormy nakshatra of destruction and renewal. It brings intense emotional release, clearing the way for transformation.

nakshatras.name: Punarvasu
nakshatras.meaning: Return of Light / Star of Renewal
nakshatras.deity: Aditi (mother of the gods, infinite consciousness)
nakshatras.description: Punarvasu represents renewal, return, and the restoration of joy. It is a fortunate, optimistic nakshatra that brings second chances.

nakshatras.name: Pushya
nakshatras.meaning: The Nourisher / Star of Nourishment
nakshatras.description: Pushya is the most auspicious nakshatra for spiritual growth and nourishment. It grants wisdom, prosperity, and the power to nurture.

nakshatras.name: Ashlesha
nakshatras.meaning: The Embracing / Star of the Serpent
nakshatras.description: Ashlesha is a serpentine nakshatra of cunning, intensity, and hidden wisdom. It grants penetrating insight and the ability to unravel secrets.

nakshatras.name: Magha
nakshatras.meaning: The Mighty One / Star of Power
nakshatras.description: Magha represents royal lineage, ancestral power, and the authority of tradition. It honors the ancestors and the legacy of the past.

nakshatras.name: Purva Phalguni
nakshatras.meaning: The Former Reddish One / Star of Passion
nakshatras.deity: Bhaga (god of marital happiness and prosperity)
nakshatras.description: Purva Phalguni governs romance, pleasure, creativity, and the enjoyment of life's sensual delights. It is associated with love affairs and the arts.

nakshatras.name: Uttara Phalguni
nakshatras.meaning: The Latter Reddish One / Star of Patronage
nakshatras.deity: Aryaman (god of patronage, contracts, and marriages)
nakshatras.description: Uttara Phalguni represents friendship, marriage, patronage, and the stability that comes after initial passion. It governs committed partnerships.

nakshatras.name: Hasta
nakshatras.meaning: The Hand / Star of Skill
nakshatras.deity: Savitr (the sun god as preserver and nourisher)
nakshatras.description: Hasta is the nakshatra of dexterity, craftsmanship, and manual skill. It grants the ability to manifest ideas into tangible form through precise action.

nakshatras.name: Chitra
nakshatras.meaning: The Bright Pearl / Star of Opportunity
nakshatras.description: Chitra represents beauty, artistry, and the power of creation. It is associated with the ability to build and design remarkable structures and works of art.

nakshatras.name: Swati
nakshatras.meaning: The Self-Going / Star of Independence
nakshatras.description: Swati is the star of independence, versatility, and the free spirit. Like the wind, it brings change, movement, and the ability to adapt.

nakshatras.name: Vishakha
nakshatras.meaning: The Forked One / Star of Purpose
nakshatras.deity: Indra-Agni (dual deities of power and fire)
nakshatras.description: Vishakha represents focused ambition, determination, and the pursuit of goals. It grants the power to achieve great things through concentrated effort.

nakshatras.name: Anuradha
nakshatras.meaning: Following Radha / Star of Devotion
nakshatras.symbol: Lotus flower or a row of lamps
nakshatras.description: Anuradha is the star of devotion, friendship, and loyalty. It governs deep bonds and the ability to remain dedicated through challenges.

nakshatras.name: Jyeshtha
nakshatras.meaning: The Eldest / Star of Seniority
nakshatras.description: Jyeshtha represents authority, seniority, and the protective power of leadership. It brings courage, responsibility, and the capacity to command respect.

nakshatras.name: Mula
nakshatras.meaning: The Root / Star of Destruction
nakshatras.description: Mula is the nakshatra of deep investigation and radical transformation. It uproots illusions and falsehoods to reveal the truth at the core.

nakshatras.name: Purva Ashada
nakshatras.meaning: The Former Invincible / Star of Victory
nakshatras.description: Purva Ashada represents purification, invincibility, and the power to cleanse. It grants the strength to overcome obstacles and emerge victorious.

nakshatras.name: Uttara Ashada
nakshatras.meaning: The Latter Invincible / Star of Lasting Victory
nakshatras.symbol: Elephant tusk or planks of a bed
nakshatras.description: Uttara Ashada brings lasting victory, universal wisdom, and the ability to achieve enduring success. It represents the culmination of effort.

nakshatras.name: Shravana
nakshatras.meaning: Hearing / Star of Listening
nakshatras.description: Shravana is the nakshatra of deep listening, learning, and spiritual receptivity. It is associated with sacred knowledge and divine communication.

nakshatras.name: Dhanishta
nakshatras.meaning: The Wealthiest / Star of Symphony
nakshatras.description: Dhanishta represents abundance, rhythm, and musical talent. It bestows wealth, fame, and the ability to harmonize different aspects of life.

nakshatras.name: Shatabhisha
nakshatras.meaning: The Hundred Physicians / Star of Healing
nakshatras.deity: Varuna (god of cosmic waters and healing)
nakshatras.description: Shatabhisha is a mysterious, healing nakshatra associated with medicine, mysticism, and the occult. It brings the power to heal and unveil hidden truths.

nakshatras.name: Purva Bhadrapada
nakshatras.meaning: The Former Auspicious Feet / Star of Awakening
nakshatras.symbol: Sword or front of a funeral cot
nakshatras.description: Purva Bhadrapada represents spiritual intensity, purification, and the burning of karma. It brings passionate, transformative energy.

nakshatras.name: Uttara Bhadrapada
nakshatras.meaning: The Latter Auspicious Feet / Star of Courage
nakshatras.symbol: Twin legs or back of a funeral cot
nakshatras.description: Uttara Bhadrapada brings stability, courage, and a calm, grounded presence. It governs the depth of the subconscious and spiritual resolve.

nakshatras.name: Revati
nakshatras.meaning: The Wealthy / Star of Nourishment
nakshatras.symbol: Fish or a pair of fish
nakshatras.description: Revati is the final nakshatra, representing completion, nourishment, and the journey home. It brings protection, abundance, and spiritual fulfillment.
